title: Between the Shadows NPC Races & Denizens (Astral + Dreamstream) — Pass A then Pass B
notes: Target: races/nightbane/npc.json. Night Avatars → patch existing race_nightlord_avatar (astral type; core p.175 + BTS pp.72–74). Astral Entities: single row with lesser/common/greater tier metadata. Dream Demons = Morpheomoth. Torturian spelling per book (not Tortirian). No Shadow O.C.C. rows — pure NPC stat blocks (nightlord_avatar pattern). Out of scope: Rage Storms, Shadow Mantis, Dream Personae, Dream Furies.
